title: rosa canina subvar. condensata
intro: Rosa canina subvar. condensata, also known as the condensed rose or dwarf dog rose, is a small shrub or deciduous woody plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. condensata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina subvar. condensata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
